content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach operates from genuine VIEW throughout. Wonder is visible in the willingness to follow live curiosity rather than script (turn 22: 'my wonder just went in this other direction' — and notably names the deflection without scolding). Vulnerability appears explicitly at turn 12 ('That's a scary question for me to ask') — a clean first-person disclosure that admits stakes without softening the question. Impartiality is the strongest signal: the coach refuses to validate the surface complaint ('they don't see me') from turn 4 onward, and there is no agenda to make the client feel better or to land at a particular insight — only a steady curiosity about the structure. Empathy is present but not performed; there are no filler-validation noises, no 'that's so valid,' no sympathy summaries. The pacing is patient — questions arrive one at a time, the coach holds the client to actually answering (turn 22 names the dodge), and the coach is willing to be wrong ('I'm not saying that's true by any stretch' in turn 8). The confrontation in turns 12, 14, 26, 34 comes from impartiality, not from needing the client to concede. The coach has no skin in the outcome.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 12, 22, 26, 28, 30, 38],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to validate the externalization; tests it with genuine curiosity rather than agenda."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Offers the reframe tentatively ('I'm not saying that's true by any stretch') — undefended, willing to be wrong."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit first-person vulnerability ('That's a scary question for me to ask') paired with the structural mirror — VIEW in one move."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the avoidance AND honors live wonder — both rigor and openness, no performance."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Mirror applied to the wanting layer; question emerges from genuine curiosity about the pattern, not preacher mode."},
    {"turn": 28, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pulls the inquiry into the live moment between them; willing to be in the question himself."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Uses himself as the test case — undefended, no need to look like a good coach."},
    {"turn": 38, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Speaks the client's want for her ('I just want it') — empathy that is felt and offered, not performed."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["mirror-the-judgment", "follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "what-if-they-did-see-you", "how-is-that-not-true-about-you", "view", "empowered-vs-power"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "The confrontational quality of the questions is from impartiality (the structure interests him more than the client's preferred framing), not from agenda. This is exactly the calibration the gold notes flag."
}
